calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-09-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Tony Schoenberg, Clerk Carla Amador, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Harold Shaim, is present.
Attorney, Scott Irwin Bassin, is present appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendants, Steven S. Lee and Mark Babin, are present.
Attorney, Steven Miller, is present representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 2059 Market Street, #40, San Francisco, CA.

This case settled, the trial date of January 14, 2008 is vacated.
